TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: qalang Piyaway ga cyux maki squ beh qalang Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. qalang Piyaway ga ini tehuk kbhul hi tayal nya,mpuw msyaw ngasal nyux sqaniy,Song Cyuw Lin ru Tang bwan ngasal tgluw nyux maki sqaniy, si say mha pyux qsinuw ru cikuy tayal na qutux qalang. puqing bnkis nha ga minkahul kgogan Botunokan.qalang qaniy ga nyux maki squ To'ing Piyasan kinhangan nqu Qwilan,te kraya nya ga qalang Qwilan te yahu nya ga qalang Raga Bnay,musa 600ÔĹě1200 meta kinwagq na umi,nyux te 'law kint'an llyung,qmuzi rgyax Tlaman mkura te htgan wagi. rhzyal kki'an lalu qalangqaniy ga sazing pintke'an nha; 1.rhiyal qaniy ga hbk'an balay na qutux qerang,Piyaway san ke tayal ru si nha lhengiy nha Piyaway smlalu la. 2.sraral mga maki qutux kneril tayal blaq balay lungan nya ma,nanu s'agal nha lalu nya smlalu la. babaw nya m'Bokusi Śģčś≠£ŚĖú yaqeh hazi pongan Piyaway qaniy,trang 1976 kawas lga skayal nya Gokosyo yugun Ri'an qu lalu nya la.misuw qaniy 10 kawas mtnaq kwara inlungan qalang mha aki kbzihan loziy lalu raral,ru Piyaway loziy lalu qalang qaniy. pinsalan raral ga,maki squ'law kraya 200 meta qutux rhiyal mzyunaw.pnongan ke bnkis ga:pira kbhul kawas sraral ga kbhul msyaw ngasal minnaki kya ma. puqing imi ke pinsalan:"rhiyal ka pinsrngyan,te sazing ga rhiyal ka pinkyalan." pinqzyu qu bnkis:"pinsalan qasa ga,wal htgal skbahing na zyuwaw mgaw.baha hmswa kahul pinsqehan wal hqelan squliq." mkura rgyax Qesu,kmayal loziy bnkis mha:"raral ga sazing mrhuw bnkis maki kya(ini baqiy lalu na sazing bnkis qasa,nyux baqun ga bnkis na Cyuw ka Song sazing bwan ngasal tgluw.) sazing ngasal qaniy ga mqhyaw na kinlkahan. maki qutux ryax sazing ngasal qaniy ga, zyuwaw na tamun kblayun qwaw ru msazyu la.mqqun ima qu balay nya, ru htgal na zyuwaw mkkut la,maki mhuqil saxa nha lwah. mkayal qu bnkis,rhiyal qaniy lga wiwal nyux syusan la,aring sqaniy lga iyat ki'un.nanu gluw na Cyuw hiya ga mkura te 'law kraya Qwayux qasa tngasal.gluw na Song hiya ga mkura te 'zil kraya Boliq qasa. mkayal mha laxiy ta pklapa, qelis qaniy ga si aki sa qsahuy lungan nha kryax." babaw nya wahan tuqiy turuy lga, tgyut aki mwah kbzeh Pinsalan loziy,ana ga snyusan qu rhiyal qaniy son nha,ini swaya maki kya qu tayal. ru mwah smhzi te kyahu nya cikay sobeh squ tuqiy turuy qaniy la. wayal qu ryax,kibahan nha sazing ngasal qaniy lga mbbiq squliq uziy la,ini psparis inlungan nha la.iyat balay kinqeri ga,1952 kawas lga mwah qu Kyokay,aring kya msblaq mssi' inlungan ru 'myuw inlungan magal pinshota utux,kwara qu pinsqehan raral ga wiwal nqu wal nha qlyu'un llyung gogan kwara la. kayal qalang ga nyux qutux Cyoro Kyokay,misuw qaniy ga Hane Taya Bokusi nyux sqaniy,tayal sqaniy ga skrangi nha "qutux ngasal " mlahang Kyokay qaniy. mpuw gaga pincbaqan Sesyo nyux nha glgan,kwara bbnkis ga skrangi nha yaba yaya kmita.mqyanux na snhyan ka sinnlwan.mkllahang,mqasuw na qnxan.qaniy qu nyux syan inlungan na qalang. kyokay pinbahuw na qalang ga:qwirux lipi qapu kaway ruma. 3 byacing ga mamu bway witak.4 byacing ga klahan na lipi ka ali ruma,5 byacing tehuk 8 byacing lga qwirux kaway ru kaway sbing ka krariy,9 byacing lga mamu bway qapu la. 1.gong Boliq kni'an qalang kahul gogan sraral,tngasal te llingay na gong,nanu tayal ga gong ka kni'an bniks sraral son nha,puqing kni'an qalang Piyaway sraral gaw,ktan uziy hnaga tunux qnryan kbhul kawas sraral. 2.tuqiy Qesuw rgyax Qesuw- qaniy ga tuqiy osa rgyax Qesuw,sintqyan na lelaqi ka bbnkis.hahul tuqiy turuy (7 Seng) mkura tuqiy Uraw qmazeh, cikuy turuy ga tehuk squ qmazeh na bnkis Tomi,mzyup kya lga mhkani na kakay la.tuqiy qesuw qaniy ga blaq balay hlahuy nya, qqsinuw qqhuniq.misuw qaniy ga nyux galan wahan mqbaq na laqi. 3. Qwayux Qwayux qaniy ga kni'an bnkis raral uziy,misuw qaniy ga yasa qu nyux galan niqan qsya na qalang Piyaway,blaq balay wahan mita qqsinuw.qlyan ga qqbhniq ktan,mhngan ga mqwas qu qpatung, mita mqu kmyap nniqun nya. 4. Uraw lingay nya qutux b'bu rgyax ga snyan qongu na Gipun sraral, sbu' nya qalang tayal,smngungu squ tayal- (Qwayux Bnay Raga Sbunaw Kgiran Piyaway).rgyax qaniy ga tlngayan na yulung krryax,qlyan ga baqun rm'r mita rgyax Nace Nagu Xuxu Rr'an, mhngan ga ktan qu pnilaw na hogan To'ing ru bbengah,blaq balay wahan rm'ra mita nnanu gaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi mrkyas tuqi 'san kahul Cyama mkura tuqiy osa Girang,kahul Girang ga mluw tuqiy mkura squ Cyama,tuqiy nqu Pehng(Tay 7 Seng) te 36 Kori bniru tuqiy lga tehuk la.
S.PHON: qalaŇč pijawaj …£a ¶~ ®jux maki s~…ēqu ő≤eńß qalaŇč toweŇč s~…ēi atu ńßos~…ēiŇč ku, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, ru kjokaj. qalaŇč pijawaj …£a ini teńßuk kő≤ńßul ńßi tajal nja,mpuw ms~…ējaw Ňčas~…ēal njux s~…ēqanij,s~…ēoŇč ¶~ ®juw lin ru taŇč ő≤wan Ňčas~…ēal t…£luw njux maki s~…ēqanij, s~…ēi s~…ēaj mńßa pjux qs~…ēinuw ru ¶~ ®ikuj tajal na qutux qalaŇč. puqiŇč ő≤nkis~…ē nńßa …£a minkańßul k…£o…£an ő≤otunokan.qalaŇč qanij …£a njux maki s~…ēqu to ĒiŇč pijas~…ēan kinńßaŇčan nqu qwilan,te kraja nja …£a qalaŇč qwilan te jańßu nja …£a qalaŇč ra…£a ő≤naj,mus~…ēa ******** meta kinwa…£q na umi,njux te Ēlaw kint Ēan lljuŇč,qmuzi r…£jax tlaman mkura te ńßt…£an wa…£i. rńßzjal kki Ēan lalu qalaŇčqanij …£a s~…ēaziŇč pintke Ēan nńßa; *.rńßijal qanij …£a ńßő≤k Ēan ő≤alaj na qutux qeraŇč,pijawaj s~…ēan ke tajal ru s~…ēi nńßa lńßeŇčij nńßa pijawaj s~…ēmlalu la. *.s~…ēraral m…£a maki qutux kneril tajal ő≤laq ő≤alaj luŇčan nja ma,nanu s~…ē Ēa…£al nńßa lalu nja s~…ēmlalu la. ő≤aő≤aw nja m Ēő≤okus~…ēi *** jaqeńß ńßazi poŇčan pijawaj qanij,traŇč **** kawas~…ē l…£a s~…ēkajal nja …£okos~…ējo ju…£un ri Ēan qu lalu nja la.mis~…ēuw qanij ** kawas~…ē mtnaq kwara inluŇčan qalaŇč mńßa aki kő≤zińßan lozij lalu raral,ru pijawaj lozij lalu qalaŇč qanij. pins~…ēalan raral …£a,maki s~…ēqu Ēlaw kraja *** meta qutux rńßijal mzjunaw.pnoŇčan ke ő≤nkis~…ē …£a:pira kő≤ńßul kawas~…ē s~…ēraral …£a kő≤ńßul ms~…ējaw Ňčas~…ēal minnaki kja ma. puqiŇč imi ke pins~…ēalan:"rńßijal ka pins~…ērŇčjan,te s~…ēaziŇč …£a rńßijal ka pinkjalan." pinqzju qu ő≤nkis~…ē:"pins~…ēalan qas~…ēa …£a,wal ńßt…£al s~…ēkő≤ańßiŇč na zjuwaw m…£aw.ő≤ańßa ńßms~…ēwa kańßul pins~…ēqeńßan wal ńßqelan s~…ēquliq." mkura r…£jax qes~…ēu,kmajal lozij ő≤nkis~…ē mńßa:"raral …£a s~…ēaziŇč mrńßuw ő≤nkis~…ē maki kja(ini ő≤aqij lalu na s~…ēaziŇč ő≤nkis~…ē qas~…ēa,njux ő≤aqun …£a ő≤nkis~…ē na ¶~ ®juw ka s~…ēoŇč s~…ēaziŇč ő≤wan Ňčas~…ēal t…£luw.) s~…ēaziŇč Ňčas~…ēal qanij …£a mqńßjaw na kinlkańßan. maki qutux rjax s~…ēaziŇč Ňčas~…ēal qanij …£a, zjuwaw na tamun kő≤lajun qwaw ru ms~…ēazju la.mqqun ima qu ő≤alaj nja, ru ńßt…£al na zjuwaw mkkut la,maki mńßuqil s~…ēaxa nńßa lwańß. mkajal qu ő≤nkis~…ē,rńßijal qanij l…£a wiwal njux s~…ējus~…ēan la,ariŇč s~…ēqanij l…£a ijat ki Ēun.nanu …£luw na ¶~ ®juw ńßija …£a mkura te Ēlaw kraja qwajux qas~…ēa tŇčas~…ēal.…£luw na s~…ēoŇč ńßija …£a mkura te Ēzil kraja ő≤oliq qas~…ēa. mkajal mńßa laxij ta pklapa, qelis~…ē qanij …£a s~…ēi aki s~…ēa qs~…ēańßuj luŇčan nńßa krjax." ő≤aő≤aw nja wańßan tuqij turuj l…£a, t…£jut aki mwańß kő≤zeńß pins~…ēalan lozij,ana …£a s~…ēnjus~…ēan qu rńßijal qanij s~…ēon nńßa,ini s~…ēwaja maki kja qu tajal. ru mwańß s~…ēmńßzi te kjańßu nja ¶~ ®ikaj s~…ēoő≤eńß s~…ēqu tuqij turuj qanij la. wajal qu rjax,kiő≤ańßan nńßa s~…ēaziŇč Ňčas~…ēal qanij l…£a mő≤ő≤iq s~…ēquliq uzij la,ini ps~…ēparis~…ē inluŇčan nńßa la.ijat ő≤alaj kinqeri …£a,**** kawas~…ē l…£a mwańß qu kjokaj,ariŇč kja ms~…ēő≤laq ms~…ēs~…ēi Ē inluŇčan ru Ēmjuw inluŇčan ma…£al pins~…ēńßota utux,kwara qu pins~…ēqeńßan raral …£a wiwal nqu wal nńßa qlju Ēun lljuŇč …£o…£an kwara la. kajal qalaŇč …£a njux qutux ¶~ ®joro kjokaj,mis~…ēuw qanij …£a ńßane taja ő≤okus~…ēi njux s~…ēqanij,tajal s~…ēqanij …£a s~…ēkraŇči nńßa "qutux Ňčas~…ēal " mlańßaŇč kjokaj qanij. mpuw …£a…£a pin ¶~ ®ő≤aqan s~…ēes~…ējo njux nńßa …£l…£an,kwara ő≤ő≤nkis~…ē …£a s~…ēkraŇči nńßa jaő≤a jaja kmita.mqjanux na s~…ēnńßjan ka s~…ēinnlwan.mkllańßaŇč,mqas~…ēuw na qnxan.qanij qu njux s~…ējan inluŇčan na qalaŇč. kjokaj pinő≤ańßuw na qalaŇč …£a:qwirux lipi qapu kawaj ruma. * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč …£a mamu ő≤waj witak.* ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč …£a klańßan na lipi ka ali ruma,* ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč teńßuk * ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a qwirux kawaj ru kawaj s~…ēő≤iŇč ka krarij,* ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a mamu ő≤waj qapu la. *.…£oŇč ő≤oliq kni Ēan qalaŇč kańßul …£o…£an s~…ēraral,tŇčas~…ēal te lliŇčaj na …£oŇč,nanu tajal …£a …£oŇč ka kni Ēan ő≤niks~…ē s~…ēraral s~…ēon nńßa,puqiŇč kni Ēan qalaŇč pijawaj s~…ēraral …£aw,ktan uzij ńßna…£a tunux qnrjan kő≤ńßul kawas~…ē s~…ēraral. *.tuqij qes~…ēuw r…£jax qes~…ēuw- qanij …£a tuqij os~…ēa r…£jax qes~…ēuw,s~…ēintqjan na lelaqi ka ő≤ő≤nkis~…ē.ńßańßul tuqij turuj (* s~…ēeŇč) mkura tuqij uraw qmazeńß, ¶~ ®ikuj turuj …£a teńßuk s~…ēqu qmazeńß na ő≤nkis~…ē tomi,mzjup kja l…£a mńßkani na kakaj la.tuqij qes~…ēuw qanij …£a ő≤laq ő≤alaj ńßlańßuj nja, qqs~…ēinuw qqńßuniq.mis~…ēuw qanij …£a njux …£alan wańßan mqő≤aq na laqi. *. qwajux qwajux qanij …£a kni Ēan ő≤nkis~…ē raral uzij,mis~…ēuw qanij …£a jas~…ēa qu njux …£alan niqan qs~…ēja na qalaŇč pijawaj,ő≤laq ő≤alaj wańßan mita qqs~…ēinuw.qljan …£a qqő≤ńßniq ktan,mńßŇčan …£a mqwas~…ē qu qpatuŇč, mita mqu kmjap nniqun nja. *. uraw liŇčaj nja qutux ő≤ Ēő≤u r…£jax …£a s~…ēnjan qoŇču na …£ipun s~…ēraral, s~…ēő≤u Ē nja qalaŇč tajal,s~…ēmŇčuŇču s~…ēqu tajal- (qwajux ő≤naj ra…£a s~…ēő≤unaw k…£iran pijawaj).r…£jax qanij …£a tlŇčajan na juluŇč krrjax,qljan …£a ő≤aqun rm Ēr mita r…£jax na ¶~ ®e na…£u xuxu rr Ēan, mńßŇčan …£a ktan qu pnilaw na ńßo…£an to ĒiŇč ru ő≤ő≤eŇčańß,ő≤laq ő≤alaj wańßan rm Ēra mita nnanu …£aw. ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan kańßul ¶~ ®jama mkura tuqij os~…ēa …£iraŇč,kańßul …£iraŇč …£a mluw tuqij mkura s~…ēqu ¶~ ®jama,tuqij nqu peńßŇč(taj * s~…ēeŇč) te ** kori ő≤niru tuqij l…£a teńßuk la.
S.FORM: qalang Piyaway ga cyux maki squ beh qalang Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. qalang Piyaway ga ini tehuk kbhul hi tayal nya,mpuw msyaw ngasal nyux sqaniy,Song Cyuw Lin ru Tang bwan ngasal tgluw nyux maki sqaniy, si say mha pyux qsinuw ru cikuy tayal na qutux qalang. puqing bnkis nha ga minkahul kgogan Botunokan.qalang qaniy ga nyux maki squ To'ing Piyasan kinhangan nqu Qwilan,te kraya nya ga qalang Qwilan te yahu nya ga qalang Raga Bnay,musa 600ÔĹě1200 meta kinwagq na umi,nyux te 'law kint'an llyung,qmuzi rgyax Tlaman mkura te htgan wagi. rhzyal kki'an lalu qalangqaniy ga sazing pintke'an nha; 1.rhiyal qaniy ga hbk'an balay na qutux qerang,Piyaway san ke tayal ru si nha lhengiy nha Piyaway smlalu la. 2.sraral mga maki qutux kneril tayal blaq balay lungan nya ma,nanu s'agal nha lalu nya smlalu la. babaw nya m'Bokusi Śģčś≠£ŚĖú yaqeh hazi pongan Piyaway qaniy,trang 1976 kawas lga skayal nya Gokosyo yugun Ri'an qu lalu nya la.misuw qaniy 10 kawas mtnaq kwara inlungan qalang mha aki kbzihan loziy lalu raral,ru Piyaway loziy lalu qalang qaniy. pinsalan raral ga,maki squ'law kraya 200 meta qutux rhiyal mzyunaw.pnongan ke bnkis ga:pira kbhul kawas sraral ga kbhul msyaw ngasal minnaki kya ma. puqing imi ke pinsalan:"rhiyal ka pinsrngyan,te sazing ga rhiyal ka pinkyalan." pinqzyu qu bnkis:"pinsalan qasa ga,wal htgal skbahing na zyuwaw mgaw.baha hmswa kahul pinsqehan wal hqelan squliq." mkura rgyax Qesu,kmayal loziy bnkis mha:"raral ga sazing mrhuw bnkis maki kya(ini baqiy lalu na sazing bnkis qasa,nyux baqun ga bnkis na Cyuw ka Song sazing bwan ngasal tgluw.) sazing ngasal qaniy ga mqhyaw na kinlkahan. maki qutux ryax sazing ngasal qaniy ga, zyuwaw na tamun kblayun qwaw ru msazyu la.mqqun ima qu balay nya, ru htgal na zyuwaw mkkut la,maki mhuqil saxa nha lwah. mkayal qu bnkis,rhiyal qaniy lga wiwal nyux syusan la,aring sqaniy lga iyat ki'un.nanu gluw na Cyuw hiya ga mkura te 'law kraya Qwayux qasa tngasal.gluw na Song hiya ga mkura te 'zil kraya Boliq qasa. mkayal mha laxiy ta pklapa, qelis qaniy ga si aki sa qsahuy lungan nha kryax." babaw nya wahan tuqiy turuy lga, tgyut aki mwah kbzeh Pinsalan loziy,ana ga snyusan qu rhiyal qaniy son nha,ini swaya maki kya qu tayal. ru mwah smhzi te kyahu nya cikay sobeh squ tuqiy turuy qaniy la. wayal qu ryax,kibahan nha sazing ngasal qaniy lga mbbiq squliq uziy la,ini psparis inlungan nha la.iyat balay kinqeri ga,1952 kawas lga mwah qu Kyokay,aring kya msblaq mssi' inlungan ru 'myuw inlungan magal pinshota utux,kwara qu pinsqehan raral ga wiwal nqu wal nha qlyu'un llyung gogan kwara la. kayal qalang ga nyux qutux Cyoro Kyokay,misuw qaniy ga Hane Taya Bokusi nyux sqaniy,tayal sqaniy ga skrangi nha "qutux ngasal " mlahang Kyokay qaniy. mpuw gaga pincbaqan Sesyo nyux nha glgan,kwara bbnkis ga skrangi nha yaba yaya kmita.mqyanux na snhyan ka sinnlwan.mkllahang,mqasuw na qnxan.qaniy qu nyux syan inlungan na qalang. kyokay pinbahuw na qalang ga:qwirux lipi qapu kaway ruma. 3 byacing ga mamu bway witak.4 byacing ga klahan na lipi ka ali ruma,5 byacing tehuk 8 byacing lga qwirux kaway ru kaway sbing ka krariy,9 byacing lga mamu bway qapu la. 1.gong Boliq kni'an qalang kahul gogan sraral,tngasal te llingay na gong,nanu tayal ga gong ka kni'an bniks sraral son nha,puqing kni'an qalang Piyaway sraral gaw,ktan uziy hnaga tunux qnryan kbhul kawas sraral. 2.tuqiy Qesuw rgyax Qesuw- qaniy ga tuqiy osa rgyax Qesuw,sintqyan na lelaqi ka bbnkis.hahul tuqiy turuy (7 Seng) mkura tuqiy Uraw qmazeh, cikuy turuy ga tehuk squ qmazeh na bnkis Tomi,mzyup kya lga mhkani na kakay la.tuqiy qesuw qaniy ga blaq balay hlahuy nya, qqsinuw qqhuniq.misuw qaniy ga nyux galan wahan mqbaq na laqi. 3. Qwayux Qwayux qaniy ga kni'an bnkis raral uziy,misuw qaniy ga yasa qu nyux galan niqan qsya na qalang Piyaway,blaq balay wahan mita qqsinuw.qlyan ga qqbhniq ktan,mhngan ga mqwas qu qpatung, mita mqu kmyap nniqun nya. 4. Uraw lingay nya qutux b'bu rgyax ga snyan qongu na Gipun sraral, sbu' nya qalang tayal,smngungu squ tayal- (Qwayux Bnay Raga Sbunaw Kgiran Piyaway).rgyax qaniy ga tlngayan na yulung krryax,qlyan ga baqun rm'r mita rgyax Nace Nagu Xuxu Rr'an, mhngan ga ktan qu pnilaw na hogan To'ing ru bbengah,blaq balay wahan rm'ra mita nnanu gaw. ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi mrkyas tuqi 'san kahul Cyama mkura tuqiy osa Girang,kahul Girang ga mluw tuqiy mkura squ Cyama,tuqiy nqu Pehng(Tay 7 Seng) te 36 Kori bniru tuqiy lga tehuk la.

®jama,tuqij nqu peńßŇč(taj * s~…ēeŇč) te ** kori ő≤niru tuqij l…£a teńßuk la.
